raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The use of bench warrants for minor infractions disproportionately punishes the working class, particularly Black and Brown communities.",
    "Research shows that the use of bench warrants is ineffective in compelling people to pay unaffordable fines.",
    "Alternatives to bench warrants have been shown to be more effective at encouraging court appearances and fine payments.",
    "In New York City, text message reminders decreased the failure to appear by 26%.",
    "Harris County, Texas, saw a decrease in failure to appear by 32% after redesigning court date notices and sending text message reminders.",
    "Bench warrants deepen existing racial and economic disparities in California by unnecessarily incarcerating low-income Black and Brown people.",
    "The United States houses nearly 25% of the world's incarcerated people despite having less than 5% of the world's population."
  ]
}
```
